ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Study number */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Sample size (n) */,
  "p" INTEGER /* Number of predictors (p) */,
  "corr" REAL /* Correlation between predictors */,
  "method" INTEGER /* Statistical method used (e.g., 3) */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Beta value */,
  "s1" INTEGER /* S1 value */,
  "s21" INTEGER /* S21 value */,
  "s22" INTEGER /* S22 value */,
  "s23" INTEGER /* S23 value */,
  "s24" INTEGER /* S24 value */,
  "s25" INTEGER /* S25 value */,
  "s3" INTEGER /* S3 value */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selection_methods" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection method */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "s1_selected" INTEGER /* S1 selected */,
  "s2_selected" INTEGER /* S2 selected */,
  "s3_selected" INTEGER /* S3 selected */,
  "no_selected" INTEGER /* Number of selected predictors */,
  "method" TEXT /* Selection method used (e.g., AIC) */,
  "k_fold" INTEGER /* Number of folds for k-fold cross-validation */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation method used (e.g., k-fold, leave-one-out) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the selection method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the selection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selection_methods_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) */,
  "r2" REAL /* R-squared (R2) */,
  "validation_results" TEXT /* JSON column to store detailed validation results */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp of when the study was created
Timestamp of the last update to the study

Unique identifier for each selection method
Number of folds for k-fold cross-validation
Type of validation method used (e.g., k-fold, leave-one-out)
